TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Sakizaya Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://szy.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_szy, title = {Sakizaya Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://szy.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: Eritrea u Eritrea sa i labu nu Feico, itiza i 15 00 N, 39 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 117,600 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 101,000 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 16,600 km2 hamin nu tademawan sa 5,869,869. kakalukan umah sa 75.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 15.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 9.80%. Er-li-cyu-ya u pu a kamu : (Yin a kamu: State of Eritrea, Ti-ke-lei-ni-ya a kamu : ·àÉ·åà·à® ·ä§·à≠·âµ·à´,a-liÿØŸàŸÑÿ© ÿ•ÿ±ÿ™ÿ±Ÿäÿß), pulung nu ngangan Er-li-cyu-ya, na i Fuy-cul sawali nu amisay a kanatal mitepal tu sumanahay a bayu, u ahebal nu lala' sabaw tusa idaw ku lima a mang nu pin-fang-kung-li, u tademaw sa 5,750,433 (2018 a mihcaan), u eneng nu tatanghan i A-si-ma-la, u binacadan sa u Ti-ke-li-ni-yaay a tademaw, u Ti-ke-lei a tademaw ku situngusay hawsa. u cacukaymasan tu kalisiw nu nay-ke-fa. tada yadah ku caay katatudung a tademaw tayni mikawaw mamin i Er-li-cyu-ya, u sihu ku misakakuay mikuwan tu tademaw makuwan nu sihu pihaceng milisapen, sikasa u hamin nu kitakit i sinbung salihalay sa misaliyud ku kawaw u sanayi'ay a kakitidaan ku mahiniay, kyu katuud ku tademaw hina sakamu tu u ''fuy-culay a pei-han''. (u kamu nu Hulam: ÂéÑÂà©ÂûÇ‰∫ûÂúã‰ºØË™û:(Ëã±Ë™û:State of Eritrea, ") tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Asmara. kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Isaias Afwerki, micakat a demiad sa i 1993 a mihca 5 bulad 24 demiad. laylay Er-li-cuy-ya naw u i Yi-sul-pi-ya a nikedalan patidengan, 1890 a mihcaan nidebungan nu Yi-ta-li, malu nu malimaday muenen Yi-ta-li tu a kakitidaan, nadikudan nu sakatusa a nikalpacaw i kitakit u malkaputay a kanatal masasulul satu sa, atu i-su-pi-ya malaheci ku nisakaputan tu Yi-sul-pi-ya atu Er-li cuy-ya malcabayay a masakaput. 1962 a mihcaan maalaw nu Yi-sul-pi-ya, malu nu sabaw sepad a kididaan nu nian tu a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: 14ÂÄãÁúÅ.) mihulakay masakaputay i 1960 a mihcaan u ziday napatideng tu Er-li-cuy-ya, u nikadademec mialaw tu Er-li-cuy-ya kyu miliyas ku Yi-su-pi-ya. Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw mahulaka kina masakaputay i 1970 a mihcaan nu ziday i Yi-sa-ya-si-a-fui-wo-er-ci ya mikelidan u nikasa tu Er-li-cuy-ya mihulakay masakaputay malaliyas tahkal, haymaw sa tu maday-li nu dikudan alaw malu nu Yi-sul-pi-ya nu maylabuay tu u kahenulan ku Er-li-cuy-ya u misataeday a paculi nu hitay. Yi-sul-pi-ya u men-ke-si-tu nipikuwan i 1991 a mihcaan mapabelin satu sa, Mi-lay-si-ce-na-wya a nisabaluhay tu sihu masasulit i Er-li-cuy-ya pasakawaw tu tademaw a paina, palucek tina kenisan tatenga' haw sa miliyas tu Yi-sul-pi-ya. 1993 a mihcaan sepatay a bulad hebek satu i masacabaay a kanatal u matatudungay ku mikawaw atu u mikantukay malingatu tu paina ku tademaw, namahida u siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa nu walu pay-hun-pi ya paliliday makaawas tu miliyas ku Yi-sul-pi-ya, sakay wida tu a mihcaan i limaay a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepatay a demiad pacudad masacacaay kunida sa. 1994 a mihcaan, u Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw mihulakay masakaputay misumad tu nu tademawan a nu binawlan misakaku atu palucekay tu sakay kawaw nu niyadu. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) 2018 a mihcaan pitu a bulad, Yi-sul-pi-ya atu Er-li-cuy-ya madem tu ku nikasasuadan hawsa, Yi-sul-pi-ya u tatangahan ci A-pi-ay-ha-may-tu-a-li kilusa mididaw mipalita tu Er-li-cuy-ya masasulit tu sakakapah nikaudipan. kina tusaay a tatangahan, u satalakaway malingatu mahtatusaay u sakasikalisiw, u manamec, u sapitupin atu masasungaay nu mapapaliyuh. (u kamu nu Hulam: 2018Âπ¥7Êúà, .) kamu nu aydaay yadah ku caay kalecad a kamu i Er-li-cuy-ya misakamu, namakayni i San-mi-te a kamu atu Ku-si-te a kamu. i Er-li-cuy-ya u kamu nu sakamuan nu binacadan idaw ku A-la-pul, Ti-ke-lei a kamu, Ti-ke-li-ni-ya a kamu atu nu aydaay a sakamuan tu Ta-li-ke a kamu(Dahlik), kina kanatal malakuid tu waluay tu a tademaw misakamu tu kamu(u kahenulin u Ti-ke-lei a kamu atu Ti-ke-li-ni-ya a kamu) u nu saayway a kamu. Yin-kul a kamu atu Yi-ta-li a kamu idaw tu ku misakamuay a tandaw. anu sakaykawaw sa u kahenulan tu Ti-ke-li-ni-ya atu a-li-pul a kamu. Ti-ke-li-ni-ya a kamu taneng musakamu tu Ci-ce a sulit tu sasulitan. (u kamu nu Hulam: (Dahlik), .) demiad talakaway nu kenis u sakapahay u sasapian nu tademaw a demiad, tu mihcaan sa u dihku nu akuti' i sabaw cacay idaw ku pitu C, u selep nu nanam 525 haw-mi. sabaw tusa a bulad katukuh i tusaay a bulad u saselepay ku demiad nu akuti', i sabaw lima C, lima a bulad katukuh i enemay a bulad u satalakaway ku akuti' nu demiad, i tusa a bataan idaw ku lima C; sepatay a bulad katukuh i limaay a bulad u maudaday a demiad, enem a bulad katukuh waluay a bulad u musaaangsangay a udad nu demiad, nikahida sa u makedalay a demiad. sawali atu satipanay u masawahulay micidek ku caledes maacak ku demiad, tu mihmihcaan sa u akuti' nu demiad i tulu C atu tusa C, tu mihmihcaan nu mudebuay nu nanam sa caay pakaala tu 400 haw-mi. ya sumanahay a bayu miduducay tu tukus u likelikenan, tulu a bulad katukuh i cacay bataan a bulad i demiad sa u lababaan kya demiad makatukuh ku sepatay C ay. (u kamu nu Hulam: 40‚ÑÉ‰ª•‰∏ä.) Er-li-cuy-ya u liwliw nu likut masasuedes Er-li-cuy-ya u liwliw nu likut masasuedes nasulitan nu wikipitiya, Er-li-cuy-ya i 1950 a mihcaan milabu tu i-su-pi-ya masakaputay; i 1962 a mihcaan, hungti nu Yi-su-pi-ya ci Say-li-si-i-se (Haile Selassie l) pakunida han tu mihulak kina malpadangay a kanatal a mikayki, lucek han mikumkum kina malpadangay a kanatal , u masacacay muawaw patayda tu tademaw palcapu tu "Er-li-cuy-ya mihulakay masakaputay" , atu Yi-su-pi-ya malingatu makaali tu tuluay a mihcaan kuheni masasuayaw a malpacaw. (u kamu nu Hulam: (Haile Selassie I) .) nudaan tu masasuayaw malalaisan u Ti-ke-lei a tademaw a nihulakan tu masakaputay atu Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw nu mahulakay u masakaputay a nikalcabacabayan. 1991 a mihcaan. nu i paykanatal miwananay sa, Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw u mihulikay masakapud patideng tu tada malakuwid ku nisakakuan nu sihu, nu dikidan i tusa a mihcaan hamin nu niyadu' namakaaaay i Yi-su-pi-ya ku nika sacacay a milapu tu masakaputay a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) 1991 a mihcaan, kina tusaay masasulid tu cacay a wiy-yun-huy a mihalhal tu kapahay a kawaw anu u canan ku nika dademec tu sakay mungday, nika nikahini nu heni tu demidemiad sa mangalep ku nikasasulinges. (u kamu nu Hulam: 1991Âπ¥, .) u heni tu ku malpacaway, kina tusaay naidaw ku nika sasulitan a mapapela' tu sin-ceng a kenis; nika masakunida ku Er-li-cuy-ya tu nadikudan, caay kasasulul kina tusaay a mipela' tu kenis. 1997 a mihcaan sabaw cacay a bulad tusaay idaw kuwalu a demiad, u Er-li-cuy-ya misabaluhay patahkal tu kalisiw u nay-ke-fa, Yi-su-pi-ya nikahida sakay i Er-li-cuy-ya misulul tu sakay kalisiw a mipulu', kina tusaay masakaputay ngalep sa tu ku nikasasulinges, kilulsatu satu nadikudan i 1998-2000 a mihcaan mapelpel tu i likut nu liuliyuan nu dadipasan a mangangayaw. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Â§ñ‰∫§ÈÉ®
S.PHON: …ôritr…ôa u …ôritr…ôa sa i r~…æabu nu f…ôi ¶o, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° mapur~…æu≈ã sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ °aj sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku **,*** km* ƒßamin nu tad…ômawan sa *,***,***. kakar~…æukan umaƒß sa **.**%, kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan umaƒß sa **.**%, zumaaj ƒß…ônaj umaƒß sa *.**%. …ôr-r~…æi- ¶ju-ja u pu a kamu : (jin a kamu: stat…ô of …ôritr…ôa, ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi-ni-ja a kamu : *** ****,a-r~…æi**** ******), pur~…æu≈ã nu ≈ãa≈ãan …ôr-r~…æi- ¶ju-ja, na i fuj- ¶ur~…æ sawar~…æi nu amisaj a kanatar~…æ mit…ôpar~…æ tu sumanaƒßaj a baju, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° sabaw tusa idaw ku r~…æima a ma≈ã nu pin-fa≈ã-ku≈ã-r~…æi, u tad…ômaw sa *,***,*** (**** a miƒß ¶aan), u …ôn…ô≈ã nu tata≈ãƒßan i a-si-ma-r~…æa, u bina ¶adan sa u ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-jaaj a tad…ômaw, u ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a tad…ômaw ku situ≈ãusaj ƒßawsa. u ¶a ¶ukajmasan tu kar~…æisiw nu naj-k…ô-fa. tada jadaƒß ku ¶aaj katatudu≈ã a tad…ômaw tajni mikawaw mamin i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶ju-ja, u siƒßu ku misakakuaj mikuwan tu tad…ômaw makuwan nu siƒßu piƒßa ¶…ô≈ã mir~…æisap…ôn, sikasa u ƒßamin nu kitakit i sinbu≈ã sar~…æiƒßar~…æaj sa misar~…æijud ku kawaw u sanaji î~ °aj a kakitidaan ku maƒßiniaj, kju katuud ku tad…ômaw ƒßina sakamu tu u î~ ° î~ °fuj- ¶ur~…æaj a p…ôi-ƒßan î~ ° î~ °. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *******:(**:stat…ô of …ôritr…ôa, ") tapa≈ã tusu nu kanatar~…æ u tapa≈ã tusu nu kanatar~…æ sa u asmara. kakininan nu kanatar~…æ d…ômiad kakini≈ã nu kanatar~…æ d…ômiad sa ** bur~…æad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapa≈ã nu kanatar~…æ u tabakiaj a tapa≈ã nu kanatar~…æ ( ¶o≈ãtu≈ã) ajza sa ¶i isaias afw…ôrki, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a miƒß ¶a * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad. r~…æajr~…æaj …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja naw u i ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja a nik…ôdar~…æan patid…ô≈ãan, **** a miƒß ¶aan nid…ôbu≈ãan nu ji-ta-r~…æi, mar~…æu nu mar~…æimadaj mu…ôn…ôn ji-ta-r~…æi tu a kakitidaan, nadikudan nu sakatusa a nikar~…æpa ¶aw i kitakit u mar~…ækaputaj a kanatar~…æ masasur~…æur~…æ satu sa, atu i-su-pi-ja mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i ku nisakaputan tu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja atu …ôr-r~…æi ¶uj-ja mar~…æ ¶abajaj a masakaput. **** a miƒß ¶aan maar~…æaw nu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja, mar~…æu nu sabaw s…ôpad a kididaan nu nian tu a kanatar~…æ. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: ****.) miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj i **** a miƒß ¶aan u zidaj napatid…ô≈ã tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja, u nikadad…ôm…ô ¶ miar~…æaw tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja kju mir~…æijas ku ji-su-pi-ja. …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw maƒßur~…æaka kina masakaputaj i **** a miƒß ¶aan nu zidaj i ji-sa-ja-si-a-fui-wo-…ôr- ¶i ja mik…ôr~…æidan u nikasa tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj mar~…æar~…æijas taƒßkar~…æ, ƒßajmaw sa tu madaj-r~…æi nu dikudan ar~…æaw mar~…æu nu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja nu majr~…æabuaj tu u kaƒß…ônur~…æan ku …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u misata…ôdaj a pa ¶ur~…æi nu ƒßitaj. ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja u m…ôn-k…ô-si-tu nipikuwan i **** a miƒß ¶aan mapab…ôr~…æin satu sa, mi-r~…æaj-si- ¶…ô-na-wja a nisabar~…æuƒßaj tu siƒßu masasur~…æit i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja pasakawaw tu tad…ômaw a paina, par~…æu ¶…ôk tina k…ônisan tat…ô≈ãa î~ ° ƒßaw sa mir~…æijas tu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja. **** a miƒß ¶aan s…ôpataj a bur~…æad ƒß…ôb…ôk satu i masa ¶abaaj a kanatar~…æ u matatudu≈ãaj ku mikawaw atu u mikantukaj mar~…æi≈ãatu tu paina ku tad…ômaw, namaƒßida u siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa nu war~…æu paj-ƒßun-pi ja par~…æir~…æidaj makaawas tu mir~…æijas ku ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja, sakaj wida tu a miƒß ¶aan i r~…æimaaj a bur~…æad tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpataj a d…ômiad pa ¶udad masa ¶a ¶aaj kunida sa. **** a miƒß ¶aan, u …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj misumad tu nu tad…ômawan a nu binawr~…æan misakaku atu par~…æu ¶…ôkaj tu sakaj kawaw nu nijadu. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: .) **** a miƒß ¶aan pitu a bur~…æad, ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja atu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja mad…ôm tu ku nikasasuadan ƒßawsa, ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja u tata≈ãaƒßan ¶i a-pi-aj-ƒßa-maj-tu-a-r~…æi kir~…æusa mididaw mipar~…æita tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja masasur~…æit tu sakakapaƒß nikaudipan. kina tusaaj a tata≈ãaƒßan, u satar~…æakawaj mar~…æi≈ãatu maƒßtatusaaj u sakasikar~…æisiw, u manam…ô ¶, u sapitupin atu masasu≈ãaaj nu mapapar~…æijuƒß. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *******, .) kamu nu ajdaaj jadaƒß ku ¶aaj kar~…æ…ô ¶ad a kamu i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja misakamu, namakajni i san-mi-t…ô a kamu atu ku-si-t…ô a kamu. i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u kamu nu sakamuan nu bina ¶adan idaw ku a-r~…æa-pur~…æ, ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a kamu, ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja a kamu atu nu ajdaaj a sakamuan tu ta-r~…æi-k…ô a kamu(daƒßr~…æik), kina kanatar~…æ mar~…æakuid tu war~…æuaj tu a tad…ômaw misakamu tu kamu(u kaƒß…ônur~…æin u ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a kamu atu ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja a kamu) u nu saajwaj a kamu. jin-kur~…æ a kamu atu ji-ta-r~…æi a kamu idaw tu ku misakamuaj a tandaw. anu sakajkawaw sa u kaƒß…ônur~…æan tu ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja atu a-r~…æi-pur~…æ a kamu. ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja a kamu tan…ô≈ã musakamu tu ¶i- ¶…ô a sur~…æit tu sasur~…æitan. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: (daƒßr~…æik), .) d…ômiad tar~…æakawaj nu k…ônis u sakapaƒßaj u sasapian nu tad…ômaw a d…ômiad, tu miƒß ¶aan sa u diƒßku nu akuti î~ ° i sabaw ¶a ¶aj idaw ku pitu ¶, u s…ôr~…æ…ôp nu nanam *** ƒßaw-mi. sabaw tusa a bur~…æad katukuƒß i tusaaj a bur~…æad u sas…ôr~…æ…ôpaj ku d…ômiad nu akuti î~ °, i sabaw r~…æima ¶, r~…æima a bur~…æad katukuƒß i …ôn…ômaj a bur~…æad u satar~…æakawaj ku akuti î~ ° nu d…ômiad, i tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…æima ¶; s…ôpataj a bur~…æad katukuƒß i r~…æimaaj a bur~…æad u maudadaj a d…ômiad, …ôn…ôm a bur~…æad katukuƒß war~…æuaj a bur~…æad u musaaa≈ãsa≈ãaj a udad nu d…ômiad, nikaƒßida sa u mak…ôdar~…æaj a d…ômiad. sawar~…æi atu satipanaj u masawaƒßur~…æaj mi ¶id…ôk ku ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs maa ¶ak ku d…ômiad, tu miƒßmiƒß ¶aan sa u akuti î~ ° nu d…ômiad i tur~…æu ¶ atu tusa ¶, tu miƒßmiƒß ¶aan nu mud…ôbuaj nu nanam sa ¶aaj pakaar~…æa tu *** ƒßaw-mi. ja sumanaƒßaj a baju midudu ¶aj tu tukus u r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan, tur~…æu a bur~…æad katukuƒß i ¶a ¶aj bataan a bur~…æad i d…ômiad sa u r~…æababaan kja d…ômiad makatukuƒß ku s…ôpataj ¶ aj. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *****.) …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u r~…æiwr~…æiw nu r~…æikut masasu…ôd…ôs …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u r~…æiwr~…æiw nu r~…æikut masasu…ôd…ôs nasur~…æitan nu wikipitija, …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja i **** a miƒß ¶aan mir~…æabu tu i-su-pi-ja masakaputaj; i **** a miƒß ¶aan, ƒßu≈ãti nu ji-su-pi-ja ¶i saj-r~…æi-si-i-s…ô (ƒßair~…æ…ô s…ôr~…æassi…ô r~…æ) pakunida ƒßan tu miƒßur~…æak kina mar~…æpada≈ãaj a kanatar~…æ a mikajki, r~…æu ¶…ôk ƒßan mikumkum kina mar~…æpada≈ãaj a kanatar~…æ , u masa ¶a ¶aj muawaw patajda tu tad…ômaw par~…æ ¶apu tu "…ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj" , atu ji-su-pi-ja mar~…æi≈ãatu makaar~…æi tu tur~…æuaj a miƒß ¶aan kuƒß…ôni masasuajaw a mar~…æpa ¶aw. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: (ƒßair~…æ…ô s…ôr~…æassi…ô i) .) nudaan tu masasuajaw mar~…æar~…æaisan u ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a tad…ômaw a niƒßur~…æakan tu masakaputaj atu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw nu maƒßur~…æakaj u masakaputaj a nikar~…æ ¶aba ¶abajan. **** a miƒß ¶aan. nu i pajkanatar~…æ miwananaj sa, …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw u miƒßur~…æikaj masakapud patid…ô≈ã tu tada mar~…æakuwid ku nisakakuan nu siƒßu, nu dikidan i tusa a miƒß ¶aan ƒßamin nu nijadu î~ ° namakaaaaj i ji-su-pi-ja ku nika sa ¶a ¶aj a mir~…æapu tu masakaputaj a kanatar~…æ. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: .) **** a miƒß ¶aan, kina tusaaj masasur~…æid tu ¶a ¶aj a wij-jun-ƒßuj a miƒßar~…æƒßar~…æ tu kapaƒßaj a kawaw anu u ¶anan ku nika dad…ôm…ô ¶ tu sakaj mu≈ãdaj, nika nikaƒßini nu ƒß…ôni tu d…ômid…ômiad sa ma≈ãar~…æ…ôp ku nikasasur~…æi≈ã…ôs. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *****, .) u ƒß…ôni tu ku mar~…æpa ¶awaj, kina tusaaj naidaw ku nika sasur~…æitan a mapap…ôr~…æa î~ ° tu sin- ¶…ô≈ã a k…ônis; nika masakunida ku …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja tu nadikudan, ¶aaj kasasur~…æur~…æ kina tusaaj a mip…ôr~…æa î~ ° tu k…ônis. **** a miƒß ¶aan sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…æad tusaaj idaw kuwar~…æu a d…ômiad, u …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja misabar~…æuƒßaj pataƒßkar~…æ tu kar~…æisiw u naj-k…ô-fa, ji-su-pi-ja nikaƒßida sakaj i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja misur~…æur~…æ tu sakaj kar~…æisiw a mipur~…æu î~ °, kina tusaaj masakaputaj ≈ãar~…æ…ôp sa tu ku nikasasur~…æi≈ã…ôs, kir~…æur~…æsatu satu nadikudan i ****-**** a miƒß ¶aan map…ôr~…æp…ôr~…æ tu i r~…æikut nu r~…æiur~…æijuan nu dadipasan a ma≈ãa≈ãajaw. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: .) mar~…æar~…æitin tu iƒß…ôkar~…æaj atu zumaaj a natin…ô≈ãan ¶ia ***
S.FORM: Eritrea u Eritrea sa i labu nu Feico, itiza i 15 00 N, 39 00 E u ahebal nu lala' mapulung sa izaw ku 117,600 km2, u ahebal nu lala'ay sa izaw ku 101,000 km2, u ahebal nu nanumay sa izaw ku 16,600 km2 hamin nu tademawan sa 5,869,869. kakalukan umah sa 75.10%, kilakilangan umah sa 15.10%, zumaay henay umah sa 9.80%. Er-li-cyu-ya u pu a kamu : (Yin a kamu: State of Eritrea, Ti-ke-lei-ni-ya a kamu : ·àÉ·åà·à® ·ä§·à≠·âµ·à´,a-liÿØŸàŸÑÿ© ÿ•ÿ±ÿ™ÿ±Ÿäÿß), pulung nu ngangan Er-li-cyu-ya, na i Fuy-cul sawali nu amisay a kanatal mitepal tu sumanahay a bayu, u ahebal nu lala' sabaw tusa idaw ku lima a mang nu pin-fang-kung-li, u tademaw sa 5,750,433 (2018 a mihcaan), u eneng nu tatanghan i A-si-ma-la, u binacadan sa u Ti-ke-li-ni-yaay a tademaw, u Ti-ke-lei a tademaw ku situngusay hawsa. u cacukaymasan tu kalisiw nu nay-ke-fa. tada yadah ku caay katatudung a tademaw tayni mikawaw mamin i Er-li-cyu-ya, u sihu ku misakakuay mikuwan tu tademaw makuwan nu sihu pihaceng milisapen, sikasa u hamin nu kitakit i sinbung salihalay sa misaliyud ku kawaw u sanayi'ay a kakitidaan ku mahiniay, kyu katuud ku tademaw hina sakamu tu u ''fuy-culay a pei-han''. (u kamu nu Hulam: ÂéÑÂà©ÂûÇ‰∫ûÂúã‰ºØË™û:(Ëã±Ë™û:State of Eritrea, ") tapang tusu nu kanatal u tapang tusu nu kanatal sa u Asmara. kakininan nu kanatal demiad kakining nu kanatal demiad sa 24 bulad 5 demiad. tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal u tabakiay a tapang nu kanatal (congtung) ayza sa ci Isaias Afwerki, micakat a demiad sa i 1993 a mihca 5 bulad 24 demiad. laylay Er-li-cuy-ya naw u i Yi-sul-pi-ya a nikedalan patidengan, 1890 a mihcaan nidebungan nu Yi-ta-li, malu nu malimaday muenen Yi-ta-li tu a kakitidaan, nadikudan nu sakatusa a nikalpacaw i kitakit u malkaputay a kanatal masasulul satu sa, atu i-su-pi-ya malaheci ku nisakaputan tu Yi-sul-pi-ya atu Er-li cuy-ya malcabayay a masakaput. 1962 a mihcaan maalaw nu Yi-sul-pi-ya, malu nu sabaw sepad a kididaan nu nian tu a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: 14ÂÄãÁúÅ.) mihulakay masakaputay i 1960 a mihcaan u ziday napatideng tu Er-li-cuy-ya, u nikadademec mialaw tu Er-li-cuy-ya kyu miliyas ku Yi-su-pi-ya. Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw mahulaka kina masakaputay i 1970 a mihcaan nu ziday i Yi-sa-ya-si-a-fui-wo-er-ci ya mikelidan u nikasa tu Er-li-cuy-ya mihulakay masakaputay malaliyas tahkal, haymaw sa tu maday-li nu dikudan alaw malu nu Yi-sul-pi-ya nu maylabuay tu u kahenulan ku Er-li-cuy-ya u misataeday a paculi nu hitay. Yi-sul-pi-ya u men-ke-si-tu nipikuwan i 1991 a mihcaan mapabelin satu sa, Mi-lay-si-ce-na-wya a nisabaluhay tu sihu masasulit i Er-li-cuy-ya pasakawaw tu tademaw a paina, palucek tina kenisan tatenga' haw sa miliyas tu Yi-sul-pi-ya. 1993 a mihcaan sepatay a bulad hebek satu i masacabaay a kanatal u matatudungay ku mikawaw atu u mikantukay malingatu tu paina ku tademaw, namahida u siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa nu walu pay-hun-pi ya paliliday makaawas tu miliyas ku Yi-sul-pi-ya, sakay wida tu a mihcaan i limaay a bulad tusa a bataan idaw ku sepatay a demiad pacudad masacacaay kunida sa. 1994 a mihcaan, u Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw mihulakay masakaputay misumad tu nu tademawan a nu binawlan misakaku atu palucekay tu sakay kawaw nu niyadu. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) 2018 a mihcaan pitu a bulad, Yi-sul-pi-ya atu Er-li-cuy-ya madem tu ku nikasasuadan hawsa, Yi-sul-pi-ya u tatangahan ci A-pi-ay-ha-may-tu-a-li kilusa mididaw mipalita tu Er-li-cuy-ya masasulit tu sakakapah nikaudipan. kina tusaay a tatangahan, u satalakaway malingatu mahtatusaay u sakasikalisiw, u manamec, u sapitupin atu masasungaay nu mapapaliyuh. (u kamu nu Hulam: 2018Âπ¥7Êúà, .) kamu nu aydaay yadah ku caay kalecad a kamu i Er-li-cuy-ya misakamu, namakayni i San-mi-te a kamu atu Ku-si-te a kamu. i Er-li-cuy-ya u kamu nu sakamuan nu binacadan idaw ku A-la-pul, Ti-ke-lei a kamu, Ti-ke-li-ni-ya a kamu atu nu aydaay a sakamuan tu Ta-li-ke a kamu(Dahlik), kina kanatal malakuid tu waluay tu a tademaw misakamu tu kamu(u kahenulin u Ti-ke-lei a kamu atu Ti-ke-li-ni-ya a kamu) u nu saayway a kamu. Yin-kul a kamu atu Yi-ta-li a kamu idaw tu ku misakamuay a tandaw. anu sakaykawaw sa u kahenulan tu Ti-ke-li-ni-ya atu a-li-pul a kamu. Ti-ke-li-ni-ya a kamu taneng musakamu tu Ci-ce a sulit tu sasulitan. (u kamu nu Hulam: (Dahlik), .) demiad talakaway nu kenis u sakapahay u sasapian nu tademaw a demiad, tu mihcaan sa u dihku nu akuti' i sabaw cacay idaw ku pitu C, u selep nu nanam 525 haw-mi. sabaw tusa a bulad katukuh i tusaay a bulad u saselepay ku demiad nu akuti', i sabaw lima C, lima a bulad katukuh i enemay a bulad u satalakaway ku akuti' nu demiad, i tusa a bataan idaw ku lima C; sepatay a bulad katukuh i limaay a bulad u maudaday a demiad, enem a bulad katukuh waluay a bulad u musaaangsangay a udad nu demiad, nikahida sa u makedalay a demiad. sawali atu satipanay u masawahulay micidek ku caledes maacak ku demiad, tu mihmihcaan sa u akuti' nu demiad i tulu C atu tusa C, tu mihmihcaan nu mudebuay nu nanam sa caay pakaala tu 400 haw-mi. ya sumanahay a bayu miduducay tu tukus u likelikenan, tulu a bulad katukuh i cacay bataan a bulad i demiad sa u lababaan kya demiad makatukuh ku sepatay C ay. (u kamu nu Hulam: 40‚ÑÉ‰ª•‰∏ä.) Er-li-cuy-ya u liwliw nu likut masasuedes Er-li-cuy-ya u liwliw nu likut masasuedes nasulitan nu wikipitiya, Er-li-cuy-ya i 1950 a mihcaan milabu tu i-su-pi-ya masakaputay; i 1962 a mihcaan, hungti nu Yi-su-pi-ya ci Say-li-si-i-se (Haile Selassie l) pakunida han tu mihulak kina malpadangay a kanatal a mikayki, lucek han mikumkum kina malpadangay a kanatal , u masacacay muawaw patayda tu tademaw palcapu tu "Er-li-cuy-ya mihulakay masakaputay" , atu Yi-su-pi-ya malingatu makaali tu tuluay a mihcaan kuheni masasuayaw a malpacaw. (u kamu nu Hulam: (Haile Selassie I) .) nudaan tu masasuayaw malalaisan u Ti-ke-lei a tademaw a nihulakan tu masakaputay atu Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw nu mahulakay u masakaputay a nikalcabacabayan. 1991 a mihcaan. nu i paykanatal miwananay sa, Er-li-cuy-ya a tademaw u mihulikay masakapud patideng tu tada malakuwid ku nisakakuan nu sihu, nu dikidan i tusa a mihcaan hamin nu niyadu' namakaaaay i Yi-su-pi-ya ku nika sacacay a milapu tu masakaputay a kanatal. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) 1991 a mihcaan, kina tusaay masasulid tu cacay a wiy-yun-huy a mihalhal tu kapahay a kawaw anu u canan ku nika dademec tu sakay mungday, nika nikahini nu heni tu demidemiad sa mangalep ku nikasasulinges. (u kamu nu Hulam: 1991Âπ¥, .) u heni tu ku malpacaway, kina tusaay naidaw ku nika sasulitan a mapapela' tu sin-ceng a kenis; nika masakunida ku Er-li-cuy-ya tu nadikudan, caay kasasulul kina tusaay a mipela' tu kenis. 1997 a mihcaan sabaw cacay a bulad tusaay idaw kuwalu a demiad, u Er-li-cuy-ya misabaluhay patahkal tu kalisiw u nay-ke-fa, Yi-su-pi-ya nikahida sakay i Er-li-cuy-ya misulul tu sakay kalisiw a mipulu', kina tusaay masakaputay ngalep sa tu ku nikasasulinges, kilulsatu satu nadikudan i 1998-2000 a mihcaan mapelpel tu i likut nu liuliyuan nu dadipasan a mangangayaw. (u kamu nu Hulam: .) malalitin tu ihekalay atu zumaay a natinengan CIA Â§ñ‰∫§ÈÉ®
S.PHON: …ôritr…ôa u …ôritr…ôa sa i r~…æabu nu f…ôi ¶o, itiza i ** ** n, ** ** …ô u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° mapur~…æu≈ã sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ °aj sa izaw ku ***,*** km*, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu nanumaj sa izaw ku **,*** km* ƒßamin nu tad…ômawan sa *,***,***. kakar~…æukan umaƒß sa **.**%, kir~…æakir~…æa≈ãan umaƒß sa **.**%, zumaaj ƒß…ônaj umaƒß sa *.**%. …ôr-r~…æi- ¶ju-ja u pu a kamu : (jin a kamu: stat…ô of …ôritr…ôa, ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi-ni-ja a kamu : *** ****,a-r~…æi**** ******), pur~…æu≈ã nu ≈ãa≈ãan …ôr-r~…æi- ¶ju-ja, na i fuj- ¶ur~…æ sawar~…æi nu amisaj a kanatar~…æ mit…ôpar~…æ tu sumanaƒßaj a baju, u aƒß…ôbar~…æ nu r~…æar~…æa î~ ° sabaw tusa idaw ku r~…æima a ma≈ã nu pin-fa≈ã-ku≈ã-r~…æi, u tad…ômaw sa *,***,*** (**** a miƒß ¶aan), u …ôn…ô≈ã nu tata≈ãƒßan i a-si-ma-r~…æa, u bina ¶adan sa u ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-jaaj a tad…ômaw, u ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a tad…ômaw ku situ≈ãusaj ƒßawsa. u ¶a ¶ukajmasan tu kar~…æisiw nu naj-k…ô-fa. tada jadaƒß ku ¶aaj katatudu≈ã a tad…ômaw tajni mikawaw mamin i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶ju-ja, u siƒßu ku misakakuaj mikuwan tu tad…ômaw makuwan nu siƒßu piƒßa ¶…ô≈ã mir~…æisap…ôn, sikasa u ƒßamin nu kitakit i sinbu≈ã sar~…æiƒßar~…æaj sa misar~…æijud ku kawaw u sanaji î~ °aj a kakitidaan ku maƒßiniaj, kju katuud ku tad…ômaw ƒßina sakamu tu u î~ ° î~ °fuj- ¶ur~…æaj a p…ôi-ƒßan î~ ° î~ °. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *******:(**:stat…ô of …ôritr…ôa, ") tapa≈ã tusu nu kanatar~…æ u tapa≈ã tusu nu kanatar~…æ sa u asmara. kakininan nu kanatar~…æ d…ômiad kakini≈ã nu kanatar~…æ d…ômiad sa ** bur~…æad * d…ômiad. tabakiaj a tapa≈ã nu kanatar~…æ u tabakiaj a tapa≈ã nu kanatar~…æ ( ¶o≈ãtu≈ã) ajza sa ¶i isaias afw…ôrki, mi ¶akat a d…ômiad sa i **** a miƒß ¶a * bur~…æad ** d…ômiad. r~…æajr~…æaj …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja naw u i ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja a nik…ôdar~…æan patid…ô≈ãan, **** a miƒß ¶aan nid…ôbu≈ãan nu ji-ta-r~…æi, mar~…æu nu mar~…æimadaj mu…ôn…ôn ji-ta-r~…æi tu a kakitidaan, nadikudan nu sakatusa a nikar~…æpa ¶aw i kitakit u mar~…ækaputaj a kanatar~…æ masasur~…æur~…æ satu sa, atu i-su-pi-ja mar~…æaƒß…ô ¶i ku nisakaputan tu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja atu …ôr-r~…æi ¶uj-ja mar~…æ ¶abajaj a masakaput. **** a miƒß ¶aan maar~…æaw nu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja, mar~…æu nu sabaw s…ôpad a kididaan nu nian tu a kanatar~…æ. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: ****.) miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj i **** a miƒß ¶aan u zidaj napatid…ô≈ã tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja, u nikadad…ôm…ô ¶ miar~…æaw tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja kju mir~…æijas ku ji-su-pi-ja. …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw maƒßur~…æaka kina masakaputaj i **** a miƒß ¶aan nu zidaj i ji-sa-ja-si-a-fui-wo-…ôr- ¶i ja mik…ôr~…æidan u nikasa tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj mar~…æar~…æijas taƒßkar~…æ, ƒßajmaw sa tu madaj-r~…æi nu dikudan ar~…æaw mar~…æu nu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja nu majr~…æabuaj tu u kaƒß…ônur~…æan ku …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u misata…ôdaj a pa ¶ur~…æi nu ƒßitaj. ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja u m…ôn-k…ô-si-tu nipikuwan i **** a miƒß ¶aan mapab…ôr~…æin satu sa, mi-r~…æaj-si- ¶…ô-na-wja a nisabar~…æuƒßaj tu siƒßu masasur~…æit i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja pasakawaw tu tad…ômaw a paina, par~…æu ¶…ôk tina k…ônisan tat…ô≈ãa î~ ° ƒßaw sa mir~…æijas tu ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja. **** a miƒß ¶aan s…ôpataj a bur~…æad ƒß…ôb…ôk satu i masa ¶abaaj a kanatar~…æ u matatudu≈ãaj ku mikawaw atu u mikantukaj mar~…æi≈ãatu tu paina ku tad…ômaw, namaƒßida u siwa a bataan idaw ku siwa nu war~…æu paj-ƒßun-pi ja par~…æir~…æidaj makaawas tu mir~…æijas ku ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja, sakaj wida tu a miƒß ¶aan i r~…æimaaj a bur~…æad tusa a bataan idaw ku s…ôpataj a d…ômiad pa ¶udad masa ¶a ¶aaj kunida sa. **** a miƒß ¶aan, u …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj misumad tu nu tad…ômawan a nu binawr~…æan misakaku atu par~…æu ¶…ôkaj tu sakaj kawaw nu nijadu. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: .) **** a miƒß ¶aan pitu a bur~…æad, ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja atu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja mad…ôm tu ku nikasasuadan ƒßawsa, ji-sur~…æ-pi-ja u tata≈ãaƒßan ¶i a-pi-aj-ƒßa-maj-tu-a-r~…æi kir~…æusa mididaw mipar~…æita tu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja masasur~…æit tu sakakapaƒß nikaudipan. kina tusaaj a tata≈ãaƒßan, u satar~…æakawaj mar~…æi≈ãatu maƒßtatusaaj u sakasikar~…æisiw, u manam…ô ¶, u sapitupin atu masasu≈ãaaj nu mapapar~…æijuƒß. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *******, .) kamu nu ajdaaj jadaƒß ku ¶aaj kar~…æ…ô ¶ad a kamu i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja misakamu, namakajni i san-mi-t…ô a kamu atu ku-si-t…ô a kamu. i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u kamu nu sakamuan nu bina ¶adan idaw ku a-r~…æa-pur~…æ, ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a kamu, ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja a kamu atu nu ajdaaj a sakamuan tu ta-r~…æi-k…ô a kamu(daƒßr~…æik), kina kanatar~…æ mar~…æakuid tu war~…æuaj tu a tad…ômaw misakamu tu kamu(u kaƒß…ônur~…æin u ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a kamu atu ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja a kamu) u nu saajwaj a kamu. jin-kur~…æ a kamu atu ji-ta-r~…æi a kamu idaw tu ku misakamuaj a tandaw. anu sakajkawaw sa u kaƒß…ônur~…æan tu ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja atu a-r~…æi-pur~…æ a kamu. ti-k…ô-r~…æi-ni-ja a kamu tan…ô≈ã musakamu tu ¶i- ¶…ô a sur~…æit tu sasur~…æitan. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: (daƒßr~…æik), .) d…ômiad tar~…æakawaj nu k…ônis u sakapaƒßaj u sasapian nu tad…ômaw a d…ômiad, tu miƒß ¶aan sa u diƒßku nu akuti î~ ° i sabaw ¶a ¶aj idaw ku pitu ¶, u s…ôr~…æ…ôp nu nanam *** ƒßaw-mi. sabaw tusa a bur~…æad katukuƒß i tusaaj a bur~…æad u sas…ôr~…æ…ôpaj ku d…ômiad nu akuti î~ °, i sabaw r~…æima ¶, r~…æima a bur~…æad katukuƒß i …ôn…ômaj a bur~…æad u satar~…æakawaj ku akuti î~ ° nu d…ômiad, i tusa a bataan idaw ku r~…æima ¶; s…ôpataj a bur~…æad katukuƒß i r~…æimaaj a bur~…æad u maudadaj a d…ômiad, …ôn…ôm a bur~…æad katukuƒß war~…æuaj a bur~…æad u musaaa≈ãsa≈ãaj a udad nu d…ômiad, nikaƒßida sa u mak…ôdar~…æaj a d…ômiad. sawar~…æi atu satipanaj u masawaƒßur~…æaj mi ¶id…ôk ku ¶ar~…æ…ôd…ôs maa ¶ak ku d…ômiad, tu miƒßmiƒß ¶aan sa u akuti î~ ° nu d…ômiad i tur~…æu ¶ atu tusa ¶, tu miƒßmiƒß ¶aan nu mud…ôbuaj nu nanam sa ¶aaj pakaar~…æa tu *** ƒßaw-mi. ja sumanaƒßaj a baju midudu ¶aj tu tukus u r~…æik…ôr~…æik…ônan, tur~…æu a bur~…æad katukuƒß i ¶a ¶aj bataan a bur~…æad i d…ômiad sa u r~…æababaan kja d…ômiad makatukuƒß ku s…ôpataj ¶ aj. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *****.) …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u r~…æiwr~…æiw nu r~…æikut masasu…ôd…ôs …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja u r~…æiwr~…æiw nu r~…æikut masasu…ôd…ôs nasur~…æitan nu wikipitija, …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja i **** a miƒß ¶aan mir~…æabu tu i-su-pi-ja masakaputaj; i **** a miƒß ¶aan, ƒßu≈ãti nu ji-su-pi-ja ¶i saj-r~…æi-si-i-s…ô (ƒßair~…æ…ô s…ôr~…æassi…ô r~…æ) pakunida ƒßan tu miƒßur~…æak kina mar~…æpada≈ãaj a kanatar~…æ a mikajki, r~…æu ¶…ôk ƒßan mikumkum kina mar~…æpada≈ãaj a kanatar~…æ , u masa ¶a ¶aj muawaw patajda tu tad…ômaw par~…æ ¶apu tu "…ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja miƒßur~…æakaj masakaputaj" , atu ji-su-pi-ja mar~…æi≈ãatu makaar~…æi tu tur~…æuaj a miƒß ¶aan kuƒß…ôni masasuajaw a mar~…æpa ¶aw. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: (ƒßair~…æ…ô s…ôr~…æassi…ô i) .) nudaan tu masasuajaw mar~…æar~…æaisan u ti-k…ô-r~…æ…ôi a tad…ômaw a niƒßur~…æakan tu masakaputaj atu …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw nu maƒßur~…æakaj u masakaputaj a nikar~…æ ¶aba ¶abajan. **** a miƒß ¶aan. nu i pajkanatar~…æ miwananaj sa, …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja a tad…ômaw u miƒßur~…æikaj masakapud patid…ô≈ã tu tada mar~…æakuwid ku nisakakuan nu siƒßu, nu dikidan i tusa a miƒß ¶aan ƒßamin nu nijadu î~ ° namakaaaaj i ji-su-pi-ja ku nika sa ¶a ¶aj a mir~…æapu tu masakaputaj a kanatar~…æ. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: .) **** a miƒß ¶aan, kina tusaaj masasur~…æid tu ¶a ¶aj a wij-jun-ƒßuj a miƒßar~…æƒßar~…æ tu kapaƒßaj a kawaw anu u ¶anan ku nika dad…ôm…ô ¶ tu sakaj mu≈ãdaj, nika nikaƒßini nu ƒß…ôni tu d…ômid…ômiad sa ma≈ãar~…æ…ôp ku nikasasur~…æi≈ã…ôs. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: *****, .) u ƒß…ôni tu ku mar~…æpa ¶awaj, kina tusaaj naidaw ku nika sasur~…æitan a mapap…ôr~…æa î~ ° tu sin- ¶…ô≈ã a k…ônis; nika masakunida ku …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja tu nadikudan, ¶aaj kasasur~…æur~…æ kina tusaaj a mip…ôr~…æa î~ ° tu k…ônis. **** a miƒß ¶aan sabaw ¶a ¶aj a bur~…æad tusaaj idaw kuwar~…æu a d…ômiad, u …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja misabar~…æuƒßaj pataƒßkar~…æ tu kar~…æisiw u naj-k…ô-fa, ji-su-pi-ja nikaƒßida sakaj i …ôr-r~…æi- ¶uj-ja misur~…æur~…æ tu sakaj kar~…æisiw a mipur~…æu î~ °, kina tusaaj masakaputaj ≈ãar~…æ…ôp sa tu ku nikasasur~…æi≈ã…ôs, kir~…æur~…æsatu satu nadikudan i ****-**** a miƒß ¶aan map…ôr~…æp…ôr~…æ tu i r~…æikut nu r~…æiur~…æijuan nu dadipasan a ma≈ãa≈ãajaw. (u kamu nu ƒßur~…æam: .) mar~…æar~…æitin tu iƒß…ôkar~…æaj atu zumaaj a natin…ô≈ãan ¶ia ***
